revision.comment: Copying from [[Category:List of Shikinaisha]] to [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]

Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates. [[{page.name}]]
Bot: tidy & size tag (11 members)
Bot: tidy & size tag (10 members)
Bot: tag as Tier 0 category
Bot: confirm enwiki category & retag
Bot: append metadata & Tier-2 tag
Text replacement - "Tier 2 Categories" to "Tier 1 Categories"

revision.text: {{EstcatCountryCentury|6|7th|6th|8th|1st|Japan}} {{draft categories| [[Category:7th-century establishments in Asia|Japan]] }} [[sn:7th-century establishments in Japan]] [[Category:Categories with 10 members]] [[en:Category:7th-century establishments in Japan]] [[Category:confirmed enwiki categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[Category:Existing categories confirmed with Wikidata]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[ja:Category:7世紀の日本の設立]] [[ar:Category:تأسيسات القرن 7 في اليابان]] [[ckb:Category:دامەزراوەکانی سەدەی ٧ەم لە ژاپۆن]] [[commons:Category:Establishments in Japan in the 7th century]] [[fa:Category:بنیان‌گذاری‌های سده ۷ (میلادی) در ژاپن]] [[hy:Category:7-րդ դարի հիմնադրումներ Ճապոնիայում]] [[simple:Category:7th-century establishments in Japan]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:confirmed enwiki categories]]" to "[[en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[category:confirmed enwiki categories]]"

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "[[commons:" to "[[co:commons:"
adding dummy category to make categories work
